content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat   Business   NAB Portal Pay   Agent help and support   Agent help and support   Useful information and resources for sales agents using NAB Portal Pay.  NAB Portal Pay support for agents   If youâ€™re a sales agent that wants to learn more about how NAB Portal works, information is available.   Receive a Deposit   Learn how buyers, sales agents and NAB Connect administrators can use Receive a Deposit in NAB Portal Pay.   Access to NAB Portal Pay   Learn how you can add and remove a userâ€™s access to NAB Portal Pay.  Enhanced Statement Files   Learn about what an Enhanced Statement File is and how it is used in NAB Portal Pay.   Understanding Transactional Data Feeds   Find out how to set up Transactional Data Feeds in NAB Portal Pay.   Understanding Payer Reference Numbers   Find out what a Payer Reference Number (PRN) is and how it can be used in NAB Portal Pay.   Generate and download a Payer Reference Number   Learn how you can generate or download a past Payer Reference Number (PRN) through NAB Portal Pay.  Tenant information for agents   Learn more about tenant-specific information and support for agents.    Tenant Portal information   Learn about the Tenant Portal and the benefits it offers in NAB Portal Pay.  Information for property managers   Learn how property managers can use NAB Portal Pay to help both new and existing tenants.   Tenant payments   Learn how payment processing, cut-off times, notifications and scheduling works in NAB Portal Pay.   Tenant registration   Find out how the tenant registration process works for NAB Portal Pay.  NAB Portal Pay tenant information  Learn more about the Tenant Portal.   Share  Video Player is loading. Transcript   Get in touch  Call NAB Portal Pay Support   You can call us during the following hours:  Monday to Friday 9am to 5pm AEST  Saturday 10am to 3pm AEST  Call 13 59 77   Email NAB Portal Pay   You can reach out to us via email and we will respond as soon as possible.   Send an email   Speak to your banker   Find out how NAB Portal Pay can help your real estate business.
